characters.name: Big Jimmy Hughes
characters.description: Father of Jimmy, Grandpa of Dominic and Logan. He brags about being hit by a train. He always wanted to take Jimmy to a basketball game. Husband of Kitty Hughes. He first appears in Guess Who's Not Coming to Dinner and last appears in Senior Olympics.

characters.name: Christine Hughes
characters.description: Christine Hughes Christine Ludke Hughes,lives withGregandKim Warnerin thereGuest House. She is considered a wild child compared to her sister Kim. When she was a teenager, she drank, smoked and was frequently in trouble with authority. She works at various jobs, but eventually returns to college. She is married to Jimmy with whom she has two sons, Logan and Dominic. Jimmy Hughes: Husband

characters.name: Dominic Hughes
characters.description: Father: Jimmy Hughes. Mother: Christine Hughes

characters.name: Don Ludke
characters.description: Is the father of Christine and Kim and grandfather of Dominic, Logan, Sammy, and Emily. He first appears in father in-law and last appears in a bunch of ice holes. He hates Greg and likes Jimmy he and Jenny are divorced. He was a baggage handler and gets to fly first class

characters.name: Greg Warner
characters.description: Greg using his Nose Spray Gregory Thomas "Greg" Warneris the husband of Kim Warner (Jean Louisa Kelly) and a motion picture executive. He is the father of Sam and Emily Warner. Greg Warner is portrayed by actor Anthony Clark.

characters.name: Greg Warner
characters.description: Greg using his Nose Spray Gregory Thomas "Greg" Warneris the husband of Kim Warner (Jean Louisa Kelly) and a motion picture executive. He is the father of Sam and Emily Warner. Greg Warner is portrayed by actor Anthony Clark.

characters.name: Jenny Ludke
characters.description: Mother of Christine and Kim ex-wife of Don grandmother of Dominic, Logan, Sammy, and Emily she likes Greg and dislikes Jimmy she first appears in Greg don't leave home without him and last appears in Shirley cooks with love.

characters.name: Jimmy Hughes
characters.description: Jimmy Hughes James "Jimmy" Hughes Jr.Was the husband ofChristine Hughes(Liza Snyder) and a security guard for a motion picture studio where Greg works. Jimmy has had many jobs over the years including pizza delivery, pet shop clerk, and handing out fliers for restaurants. He and Christina have two sons, Dominic and Logan Hughes. He attended Frostburg State University. Jimmy is a big fan of the Washington Redskins. He was a cast member of the reality show "Big Brother" but was disqualified when his brother-in-law, Greg, interfered. He later moved to Natesville and passed away on a cruise ship. Jimmy is portrayed by actor Mike O'Malley.

characters.name: Kim Warner
characters.description: Kimberly "Kim" Warner(neeLudke) is the wife of Greg Warner (Anthony Clark). She is portrayed by actress Jean Louisa Kelly.  Greg Warner - Husband

characters.name: Kim Warner
characters.description: Kimberly "Kim" Warner(neeLudke) is the wife of Greg Warner (Anthony Clark). She is portrayed by actress Jean Louisa Kelly.  Greg Warner - Husband

characters.name: Logan Hughes
characters.description: Logan Hughes is the second son of Christine and Jimmy Hughes, the younger brother to Dominic Hughes. Logan is played by several different actors, creating a running joke in the series. It is mentioned in Season 3 that he wants to be a stuntman when he is older (as Dominic tries to be an actor and Logan is shown to be not so bright).

characters.name: Sam Warner
characters.description: Father: Greg Warner Mother: Kim Warner

characters.name: The Wiggly Group
characters.description: The Wiggly Groupare the main group of characters inThe Wigglesfranchise. They areThe Wiggles,Dorothy the Dinosaur,Henry the Octopus,Captain Feathersword, andWags the Dog. They appeared inMake Every Second Count.
